name: Dolly Chaiwala
profileSummary: Pato Sunil Patil, popularly known as Dolly Chaiwala, is an Indian tea vendor and social media personality. He gained national attention for his flamboyant tea-making style and distinctive persona. Dolly's style and attire are inspired by South Indian cinema, the character Jack Sparrow played by Johnny Depp, and Rajinikanth's iconic gestures. Dolly went viral in February 2024 after a video showed him serving tea to Microsoft co-founder Bill Gates, leading to widespread media coverage and turning his tea stall, Dolly Ki Tapri, into a popular local attraction.
